title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at Testbook Capital India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Teacher at Testbook Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Testbook Capital India family as a Teacher in Bhopal. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Testbook Capital India:
Testbook Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Testbook Capital India!
